category_sources: Official Ravenbrook page https://www.ravenbrook.com/project/mps/ and GitHub README describe MPS as a memory management system.
display_name_sources: GitHub README heading: Memory Pool System Kit Readme.
Official Ravenbrook homepage title: Memory Pool System
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the manual at memory-pool-system.readthedocs.io.
Official Ravenbrook homepage links to Read the documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Ravenbrook/mps; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes manual and automatic memory management, allocation, finalization, and garbage collection support.
source_facts.description identifies the project as Memory Pool System.
